title: SQL Mission 8: Pagination With Keyset Filter

initialState.content:
-- Mission 8 Guidelines
-- Inputs:
--   cursor_date = '2025-10-01'
--   cursor_order_id = 4500
-- Return next 20 older rows
-- Sort by order_date DESC, order_id DESC

SELECT
  order_id,
  order_date,
  total_amount
FROM orders
WHERE
  -- TODO keyset condition
ORDER BY order_date DESC, order_id DESC
LIMIT 20;

rules: must_include:order by order_date desc, order_id desc
